pages.name: Build Guide
pages.text: Top the block with a SKELETON skull (only skeleton skulls build block golems).
$(l)Behavior:$() Utility golem. Follows its owner, roams when idle, and can be told to sit (sneak + right-click).

$(l)Hidden powers:$()$(br)$(li)It $(o)glows like a torch as it walks$(), lighting everything around it.$(li)Fill its $(o)9-slot inventory$() with torches or glowstone and it will $(o)place them in dark spots$() as it passes, permanently lighting the area behind it: a walking spawn-proofer.
